svg.title: BR-001 Gherkin spec-first pipeline
svg.desc: Six-stage pipeline from BR-001 through Gherkin feature files, IR validation, stack detection, test generation, and implementation gate

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Show me the portfolio valuation feature file')
sendPrompt('What does the IR validation check?')
sendPrompt('How does stack detection work for EPM?')
sendPrompt('Show me the generated pytest tests for SC-007')
sendPrompt('Show me the full traceability matrix')
sendPrompt('What is Uncle Bob\'s implementation gate rule?')
g.text: Tests green → NOW Antigravity writes production code. Not before.
